features: Rich body care, specially developed for very dry skin - for 3x more moisture
The rich lotion with Ceramide Building Serum provides moisture for 48 hours
Dove Body Milk is Peta Approved. The bottle of the Dove body lotion is made from 100% recycled plastic (without cap and label)
description: Dove Body Love Intensive Care Body Lotion helps deeply regenerate and nourish very dry skin with its fast-absorbing formula. This is especially important for this skin type, because caring for particularly dry skin can be difficult. The body lotion for very dry skin contains the Ceramide Building Serum. This is a unique combination of ingredients that help the skin form essential ceramides to strengthen the skin barrier and retain its natural moisture - for 3x more moisture. The body lotion is dermatologically tested and suitable for daily care. The rich, creamy formula absorbs quickly and moisturises for up to 48 hours - for supple skin that feels regenerated. Massage the rich cream for very dry skin into the fingertips with circular movements. Apply from feet upwards to instantly get soft, radiant skin. Rough skin areas enjoy an extra dose of Dove intensive care body lotion. When the body lotion is applied before bedtime, dry skin has more time to absorb nutrients. Dove is PETA certified and Dove skin care products carry the PETA-approved logo. At Dove we believe in Body Love. With the right care, we can give our body a little love at any time, regardless of how we feel in our skin. Dove helps women unleash the full potential of their individual beauty. We develop products that meet the special needs of skin and hair. Because the principle of Dove is, only those who feel beautiful and comfortable in their skin through proper care can radiate it.
